results.name: pt01_linear_correct

results.description: nn.Linear dimension mismatch: in_features=10 but input has dim 8

results.description: Two-layer MLP with correct chain

results.name: pt04_two_linears_mismatch
results.description: Linear chain mismatch: fc1 outputs 128 but fc2 expects 64

results.description: Flatten via view(-1) then Linear(784,10)

results.name: pt06_reshape_wrong_total
results.description: Flatten produces 784 but Linear expects 500

results.description: Simple matmul through Linear: (batch,64) @ (64,32)

results.description: Matmul inner dim mismatch: input last dim 48 != 64

results.name: pt09_conv2d_correct
results.description: Conv2d with correct input channels=3

results.name: pt10_conv2d_channel_mismatch
results.description: Conv2d channel mismatch: expects 3 channels but input has 1

results.name: pt11_broadcast_correct
results.description: Residual addition: (batch,10) + (batch,10) broadcasts correctly

results.name: pt12_device_mismatch_add
results.description: Device mismatch: h on CPU, y moved to CUDA, then added

results.name: pt13_device_mismatch_matmul
results.description: Device mismatch: h moved to CUDA but fc2 weights are on CPU

results.name: pt14_device_correct_both_cuda
results.description: Both input and model on same device (CPU)

pytea_info.reason: No device tracking (but would not report error)

results.name: pt15_dropout_train_eval
results.description: Dropout is shape-preserving in both train and eval phases

results.name: pt16_batchnorm_train_eval
results.description: BatchNorm1d tracks running stats differently in train vs eval

results.description: Full ResNet residual block with skip connection

results.name: pt18_transformer_attention
results.description: Attention: qkv outputs 1536 but proj expects 512 — dimension error

pytea_info.reason: No bounded model checking of attention mechanisms

results.description: Embedding(1000,128) -> Linear(128,10)

results.description: Embedding outputs 128 but Linear expects 64

results.description: Simplified U-Net encoder-decoder, correct channel flow

results.description: U-Net bug: dec2 expects 128 channels but enc2 only outputs 64

results.name: arch11_gan_shape_mismatch
